mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces discount rates applied to future equity cash flows, directly boosting S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 5.0 percent, it signals a deteriorating labor market that suppresses consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or threshold crossing fails to predict direction with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in retail sales and housing starts indicate a broad-based collapse in consumer demand, which reduces corporate revenues and generates negative equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: Joint decline in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict negative returns, or interaction term loses explanatory power in multivariate regression over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A persistent month-over-month contraction in the index of industrial production reflects weakening factory output and capacity utilization, forecasting negative equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns remain positive in > 55% of contraction months during recession onset, or Rank IC drops below 0.02 in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Positive month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls supports household income and consumption, creating a short-term tailwind for equity prices over the next trading week.
failure_condition: Payroll growth fails to predict positive 5-day returns, or signal accuracy drops below 50% in walk-forward validation across multiple market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: When core inflation measured by CPI exceeds 0.5 percent month-over-month, it forces expectations of tighter monetary policy and higher discount rates, suppressing forward equity returns.
failure_condition: High inflation months do not correspond to negative 20-day returns, or the threshold condition yields a negative predictive accuracy in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A widening divergence where GDP growth outpaces retail sales growth signals inventory accumulation and weakening final demand, leading to negative corporate earnings revisions and lower equity returns.
failure_condition: The GDP-retail sales spread fails to predict negative 60-day returns, or the interaction effect becomes statistically insignificant in rolling regression analysis.

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment alongside stagnant payroll growth indicates structural labor market deterioration, which reduces consumer confidence and earnings growth, forecasting negative equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint labor signal fails to predict negative returns during late-cycle expansions, or predictive accuracy falls below 52% in regime-filtered walk-forward tests.
